titleStmt.title: SII 15.126: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 126. (B.K. No. 13 of 1929-30.) GŌṬKHAṆḌKI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up near the Hanumān temple.
This is dated śaka 1096, Jaya, Pushya śu. 13, Sunday, corresponding to 1174 A.D., December 8.

It records a gift of land and house-site for maintaining a charitable picotta at the well of the god Gaṅgēśyara by Nāgadēvanāyaka, son of Mahādēvanāyaka, the Prabhu of Goṭṭakhaṇḍike in Hagariṭṭage Three Hundred with the approval of Mahāpradhāna, Bammadēva-daṇḍanāyaka who bore the epithets Lāḷakhaṇḍeya-nāyaka and Aṇugasāhaṇādhipati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trai
ḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
śrīmatkaḷacu¨ryya cakrava¨rtti rāyamurāri sō
vidēvakālada sakava¨rṣada 1096 neya jaya saṁvatsarada
puṣya su 13 Ādivāradaṁdu śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ lāḷa
khaṁḍeyanāyakādhiṣṭhāyakaṁ Aṇuga sāhaṇādhipati
mahāpasāyita Aribhujabaḷa baṁmadēva daṁḍanā
yakaranumatadiṁ hagariṭṭage muṁnūṟaṟa baḷi
ya bāḍaṁ śrīmatu gūṭṭakhaṁḍakiyi pra
bhu mahādēva nāyakara maga baṁdhuciṁtāma
ṇiyuṁ gōtrapavitranuṁ dha¨rmmatatuparanuṁ
dēvabrāhmaṇa prasāda śrī sō
manāthadēvara śrī pādārādhakanumappa nāga
dēvanāyakaru gaṁgeśvēradēvara bāviya dha
¨rmmētakke Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpāta
nimittavāgi yā dha¨rmmētavaṁ caṁdrā¨rkkaruḷḷa
nnevaravettuvaṁtāgi kuḍi de[yva nāda bha-]
mmāḍimeyanamaga rēcaṇa yaṇaṁga
ḷige hiṭṭa dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa keyi
1diṁ paḍuvaṇa sīmeyalu bammanahaḷḷiya dā
riyiṁ baḍaga caccigiya sīmeyiṁ mūḍa Ādāri
yiṁ teṁka mānya gōla mattaru haṁnneraḍu cadu
rasa haṁnnikeyya mane nivēśana yintinitumaṁ sa
¨rbbanamasyavāgi koṭṭaru yiṁtī dha¨rmmavaṁ pratipāḷsida
varige śrī vāraṇāsiya taḍiyalu sāyira vē
dapāragarappa brāhmaṇarige sāvirakavileyanuṁ da
kṣiṇe sahita koṭṭa phalaṁ sā¨rggu yī dhammadanyāyavaṁ
ciṁtisidavarige Ā vāraṇāsiyalā brāhmaṇa
rumanā kavileymaṁ vadhiyisida pāpaṁ sā¨rggu .
© svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhi
¨rvva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 15.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
